summary: Events & Tickets Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all flows verified via Playwright)

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about span inside select/option - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/events - Returns published events with price and availability
GET /api/events/featured - Returns next upcoming event (Summer Slam 2026)
GET /api/events/{id} - Returns specific event with tickets_remaining
GET /api/events/{invalid} - Returns 404 for invalid event ID
GET /api/payment-info - Returns bank transfer details
POST /api/tickets/reserve (box_office) - Creates ticket with Abendkasse payment
POST /api/tickets/reserve (transfer) - Creates tickets with Überweisung payment
POST /api/tickets/reserve (invalid event) - Returns 404
GET /api/tickets/{id}/pdf - Returns valid PDF file with QR code
POST /api/tickets/validate/{code} - Requires scanner auth (401 without)
POST /api/tickets/validate/{code} - Returns 'already checked in' for used ticket
POST /api/tickets/validate/{code} - Returns 'not found' for invalid code
GET /api/admin/events - Returns all events with ticket counts
GET /api/admin/events/{id}/tickets - Returns ticket list for event
POST /api/admin/events - Creates new event
Admin endpoints require authentication (401 without)
GET /api/admin/payment-settings - Returns payment settings
PUT /api/admin/payment-settings - Updates payment settings
Events page at /veranstaltungen - Shows 2 published events with price and availability
Event detail page - Shows full event info with booking button
Booking form - All fields present (name, email, phone, quantity, payment method)
Booking flow - Complete reservation with Überweisung payment method
Confirmation page - Shows ticket codes, PDF download links, bank transfer details
Navbar - Shows 'VERANSTALTUNGEN' link that navigates to /veranstaltungen
Homepage - Event teaser section shows next event (Summer Slam 2026)
Event teaser - 'Mehr erfahren' button links to event detail page
Admin panel - Events tab shows event list with ticket count, edit/delete buttons
Admin panel - Payment settings tab shows bank transfer configuration form
critical_code_review_comments: EventsPage.jsx correctly fetches and displays published events with availability badges
EventDetailPage.jsx implements complete booking flow with form validation
Confirmation page correctly shows bank transfer details when Überweisung selected
EventTeaser.jsx fetches featured event and displays on homepage
EventsManager.jsx in admin panel provides full CRUD for events with ticket viewing
PaymentSettings.jsx allows admin to configure bank transfer details
PDF generation includes QR code with ticket code for scanning
Ticket validation endpoint correctly handles check-in state

tickets.status: was unchecked, now checked in during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Events & Tickets feature fully functional: 1) Public events page at /veranstaltungen with event cards. 2) Event detail page with ticket booking form (Abendkasse/Überweisung). 3) Confirmation page with ticket codes, PDF downloads, and bank transfer details. 4) Homepage event teaser showing next upcoming event. 5) Admin panel has Events tab for CRUD and Payment Settings tab for bank config. 6) Ticket scanner role can validate tickets via POST /api/tickets/validate/{code}. Key endpoints: GET /api/events, GET /api/events/featured, POST /api/tickets/reserve, GET /api/tickets/{id}/pdf, POST /api/tickets/validate/{code}. Email sending is MOCKED (fastapi-mail mock SMTP).

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via fastapi-mail uses mock SMTP - emails are logged but not actually delivered
